t1_fidelity_table.upstream_quote: Surrogate primary key, auto-incremented. NOT FOR REPLICATION indicates replication topology. Uniquely identifies each split event.
t1_fidelity_table.wiki_quote: Surrogate primary key, auto-incremented. NOT FOR REPLICATION indicates replication topology. Uniquely identifies each split event.

t1_fidelity_table.upstream_quote: The stock instrument this split applies to. FK to Trade.Instrument. CHECK constraint enforces InstrumentID > 1000 - only stock instruments (not forex or crypto).
t1_fidelity_table.wiki_quote: The stock instrument this split applies to. FK to Trade.Instrument. CHECK constraint enforces InstrumentID > 1000 — only stock instruments (not forex or crypto).
t1_fidelity_table.loss: Hyphen replaced with em-dash — no semantic loss

t1_fidelity_table.upstream_quote: Start of the period this split ratio is effective. Default '2000-01-01' means "from the beginning of the instrument's history." The split adjustment applies to transactions from this date forward until MaxDate.
t1_fidelity_table.wiki_quote: Start of the period this split ratio is effective. Default '2000-01-01' means "from the beginning of the instrument's history." The split adjustment applies to transactions from this date forward until MaxDate.

t1_fidelity_table.upstream_quote: End of the period this split ratio is effective (exclusive). Sentinel value '2100-01-01' means "currently active - no end date set." When a new split occurs, the current active row's MaxDate is set to the new split's MinDate.
t1_fidelity_table.wiki_quote: End of the period this split ratio is effective (exclusive). Sentinel value '2100-01-01' means "currently active — no end date set." When a new split occurs, the current active row's MaxDate is set to the new split's MinDate.
t1_fidelity_table.loss: Hyphen replaced with em-dash — no semantic loss

t1_fidelity_table.upstream_quote: Multiplier applied to historical prices after this split. Equal to UnitsBefore/UnitsAfter. For a 2-for-1 split: PriceRatio=0.5 (price halved). For a 1-for-2 reverse split: PriceRatio=2. CHECK constraint enforces > 0. Default 1 = no adjustment.
t1_fidelity_table.wiki_quote: Multiplier applied to historical prices after this split. Equal to UnitsBefore/UnitsAfter. For a 2-for-1 split: PriceRatio=0.5 (price halved). For a 1-for-2 reverse split: PriceRatio=2. CHECK constraint enforces > 0. Default 1 = no adjustment.

t1_fidelity_table.upstream_quote: Multiplier applied to position unit counts after this split. Equal to UnitsAfter/UnitsBefore. For a 2-for-1 split: AmountRatio=2 (units doubled). For a 1-for-2 reverse split: AmountRatio=0.5. CHECK constraint enforces > 0. Default 1 = no adjustment.
t1_fidelity_table.wiki_quote: Multiplier applied to position unit counts after this split. Equal to UnitsAfter/UnitsBefore. For a 2-for-1 split: AmountRatio=2 (units doubled). For a 1-for-2 reverse split: AmountRatio=0.5. CHECK constraint enforces > 0. Default 1 = no adjustment.

t1_fidelity_table.upstream_quote: Original unadjusted price ratio stored as money type. Before cumulative split adjustments are applied. Used for audit and comparison.
t1_fidelity_table.wiki_quote: Original unadjusted price ratio stored as money type. Before cumulative split adjustments are applied. Used for audit and comparison. DWH note: stored as decimal(19,4) in Synapse (money in production).
t1_fidelity_table.loss: DWH type-cast note appended — no upstream text removed

t1_fidelity_table.upstream_quote: Original unadjusted amount ratio stored as money type. Before cumulative adjustments.
t1_fidelity_table.wiki_quote: Original unadjusted amount ratio stored as money type. Before cumulative adjustments. DWH note: stored as decimal(19,4) in Synapse (money in production).
t1_fidelity_table.loss: DWH type-cast note appended — no upstream text removed

issues.problem: Hyphen-to-em-dash substitution in Tier 1 descriptions. Trivial but not byte-identical to upstream.
[UNVERIFIED] tag in tier counts is unnecessary — all columns are verified against the bundle.
No explicit Phase Gate Checklist section. Footer claims Phases: 11/11 but the checklist is not rendered.

verdict.regeneration_feedback: No regeneration needed. Optional polish: (1) Replace em-dashes back to hyphens in InstrumentID and MaxDate descriptions for byte-perfect upstream fidelity. (2) Add explicit Phase Gate Checklist section. (3) Remove [UNVERIFIED] from footer tier counts.
